name: agent-passport-system
description: Enforcement and accountability layer for AI agents. Bring your own identity (did:key, did:web, SPIFFE, OAuth, did:aps). Policy eval <2ms, 14 constraint dimensions, 403 ops/sec. Gateway enforcement, monotonic narrowing, cascade revocation, Bayesian reputation, wallet binding, unified four-axis attribution primitive, per-period attribution settlement, data lifecycle, mutual authentication, Wave 1 accountability primitives (action, authority-boundary, custody, contestability, bundle), evidentiary type safety (claim/evidence registry, claim verifier with forbidden-substitution detection, contestation cascade). 2,586 tests.

scripts.postpublish: if [ -d ~/aeoess_web ]; then cd ~/aeoess_web && node scripts/propagate.mjs --apply --commit; else echo 'postpublish: ~/aeoess_web not found, skipping propagation'; fi
